abilities.name: Sage Advice
abilities.text: When an ally within 6" would gain an Adaptable token, that ally may gain an Impact token instead, or vice versa.

abilities.name: "That the Best Ya Got?"
abilities.text: Enemy (magic) and (missile) actions that target allies within 6" suffer -1 Skl.

actions.name: Back in My Day...
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has at least one token, deal +1 damage to it.

triggers.name: Strip Defenses
triggers.text: This model may remove a token from the target.

triggers.name: Get In There
triggers.text: A non-unique friendly model in LoS of the target may move up to 3" toward the target.

triggers.name: Mental Trauma
triggers.text: Target must either discard a card or be dealt 3 damage.

actions.name: "Give Me a Hand, Kid"
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target an ally that has not yet activated this turn. Target moves up to 4". Then, place this model into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: One o' the Good 'Uns
triggers.text: After resolving, the target moves up to 4" and gains an Impact token.
